parameters.name: ={{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd') + ' - ' + $('Code - Script Gen + Score Loop').item.json.product + ' - ' + $('Code - Script Gen + Score Loop').item.json.topic.replace(/ /g, '-') }}

assignments.name: failure_report
